insight_name.description: Human-readable name for this analysis (e.g., 'Mood Statistics', 'Weight Progression')

output_mode.description: Output format: scalar for stats, vector for series, matrix for time-series with timestamps

logic_fragment.description: JavaScript function body. Use 'return' to output results. Libraries ss and jStat are global. data.values and data.timestamps are global.

reasoning.description: Brief explanation of the analysis approach and why this output mode was chosen
